I just realized last night there is another ghost lurking in my psyche that I will need to slay. The ghost of my grandmother which manifested in my mother and then manifested again in the women I have been involved with

Until then I will not be able to experience true intimacy since that part of the cognition is fixed the attraction pattern is geared towards physically and emotionally abusive women 

And women if they do end up in a relationship with me will not be able to experience true intimacy since they will be living in the shadow of this inter generational ghost 

I caught a glimpse of it just now when I was on the cusp of waking it. The presence it emitted was eriee and when I observed my reptilian body, it was shivering in fear. Much like how as a child I was hiding in the corner know my mum and her mum is going to come at me with the cane again.
